subcodes.title: Khutbata’r-Raj’a (Khutba written in Jidda)
subcodes.first_line: Praised be to God! Who raised up the Celestial Throne upon the watery expanse and the atmosphere above the surface of the watery expanse.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی قد اقام العرش علی الماء والهواء علی وجه الماء و فرق بینهما علی کلمة اللاء ثم قد فتق الاجواء من عالم العماء
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @mystical themes, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @pilgrimage [Hajj] in Islam, @transcendence; unknowability of God
